title: asteropyrum peltatum
intro: Asteropyrum peltatum is a flowering plant species, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It is commonly known as the southern wood's rose, and its medicinal properties are primarily based on its leaves and roots. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Traditionally, the leaves and roots of Asteropyrum peltatum are used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
